commands.review_summary:
Adds an English/zh-CN CLI setup message catalog, locale detection and persistence via `cli.locale`/`OPENCLAW_LOCALE`, localized setup/finalization copy, config docs/schema/help labels, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of latest PR head shows zh-CN is resolved before setup continues, but the acknowledgement path still emits English constants and quickstart existing-setting values still come from English formatters.
